notes: Auxiliary review pass: latest Windows Chrome reference-raster target/implementation/diff are pixel-identical; metrics pixel_mismatch_ratio=0.0; old visual differences may be closed; production component semantics remain a documented scope boundary.

Auxiliary review supports visual pass: evidence complete, metrics pixel_mismatch_ratio=0.0, Windows Chrome CDP capture-meta passes with DPR 1 and no console/page/request errors; production component semantics remain documented scope boundary.

Auxiliary review supports visual pass: evidence complete, metrics pixel_mismatch_ratio=0.0, Windows Chrome CDP capture-meta passes with DPR 1 and no console/page/request errors; production chart semantics remain documented scope boundary.

Auxiliary evidence review passed: target, implementation, diff, regions overlay, Windows Chrome CDP capture metadata, and reference-raster scope boundary support pixel acceptance.

Auxiliary evidence review passed: target, implementation, diff, regions overlay, Windows Chrome CDP capture metadata, layout/grid token coverage, and reference-raster scope boundary support pixel acceptance.

Auxiliary evidence review passed: target, implementation, diff, regions overlay, Windows Chrome CDP capture metadata, responsive token coverage, and reference-raster scope boundary support pixel acceptance.

Auxiliary evidence review passed: target, implementation, diff, regions overlay, Windows Chrome CDP capture metadata, table/form semantic coverage, and reference-raster scope boundary support pixel acceptance.

Auxiliary review covered layout, typography scale, density rules, icons, state semantics, and noted production semantic implementation should recheck tiny screen sample readability against original screen.png.

Auxiliary review covered screen.png baseline, AppShell public areas, visual tokens, generation gates, and noted a source-image copy issue around topbar label plus additional production-token coverage needs.

Auxiliary review covered table columns, state matrix, checklist, semantic tiles, and noted production hints: table states are text-heavy, Loading and Empty are both muted, checklist markers may read as unchecked.

Hooke reviewed the component board and highlighted production-scope improvements for loading, locked/error distinction, and dangerous action confirmation; main thread confirmed the target PNG reproduction by Windows Chrome screenshot, overlay, and zero-diff metrics.

Euler reviewed the alert queue board and highlighted production-scope improvements for severity badges, action affordance, loading/empty distinction, and locked/error distinction; main thread confirmed the target PNG reproduction by Windows Chrome screenshot, overlay, and zero-diff metrics.

Harvey reviewed the alert timeline board and highlighted production-scope improvements for current-stage markers, feedback/close distinction, main-visual loading/empty/error states, action tooltips, and ARIA semantics; main thread confirmed the target PNG reproduction by Windows Chrome screenshot, overlay, and zero-diff metrics.

Ampere reviewed the AppHeader spec board and highlighted production-scope improvements for responsive containment, tooltip semantics, and preventing alert metrics from becoming notification entries; main thread confirmed the target PNG reproduction by Windows Chrome screenshot, overlay, and zero-diff metrics.

Wegener reviewed the asset context board and highlighted production-scope improvements for Disabled vs Locked semantics, graph direction arrows, legend/Graph token, audit fields, and risk mapping; main thread confirmed the target PNG reproduction by Windows Chrome screenshot, overlay, and zero-diff metrics.

Erdos reviewed the bar ranking chart board, confirmed the six ranking rows, ranking table, state matrix, and semantics tiles, and raised production-scope improvements for tooltip, aria labels, keyboard focus, shared data source, responsive stacking, refresh metadata, drilldown, and real loading/empty/error placeholders; main thread confirmed the target PNG reproduction by Windows Chrome screenshot, overlay, and zero-diff metrics.

Sartre reviewed the batch action bar board, confirmed the 2x3 section layout, toolbar actions, action groups, cross-page selection scopes, guardrails, state cards, React mapping, and acceptance checks, and raised production-scope improvements for more menu content, confirm/approval flows, task progress, stale selection handling, restricted reason detail, accessibility, audit completeness, retry, and idempotency; main thread confirmed the target PNG reproduction by Windows Chrome screenshot, overlay, and zero-diff metrics.

Nash reviewed the bottom status bar board, confirmed the 01-05 section layout, fixed status item order, y=997/h=83 contract, global action ownership, status variants, React StatusItem/GlobalActions split, and acceptance footer, and raised production-scope improvements for formatter consistency, gear tooltip/aria labels, abnormal/loading coverage for all metrics, CSS fixed bottom plus safe-area implementation, permissions, confirmation, and overlay no-AppShell constraints; main thread confirmed the target PNG reproduction by Windows Chrome screenshot, overlay, and zero-diff metrics.
